title: ForgeFlow Experiment Config
description: Configuration for an XLOOP automated experiment run.

metric_command.description: Command to execute for measuring the metric, as a list of arguments (no shell injection).

metric_key.description: JSON key in metric output to track (e.g. 'passed', 'duration').

direction.description: Optimization direction: 'higher' to maximize, 'lower' to minimize.

circuit_breaker_limit.description: Number of consecutive non-improvements before the circuit breaker trips.

min_improvement.description: Minimum improvement threshold to accept a change.

cwd.description: Working directory for metric commands. Null uses current directory.
